title: Gently Grilled Syrian Orange Ice Cream Gratin
description: A citrusy and fluffy Syrian dessert featuring ice cream, grilled to perfection in individual mini cocottes, vegan friendly.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Whisk together orange juice, maple syrup, orange zest, and lemon juice in a small bowl.
Add cornstarch to the bowl and whisk until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a small saucepan and cook over low heat until thickened.
Scoop the coconut milk ice cream into individual mini cocottes.
Drizzle the cooked orange mixture over the ice cream in each cocotte.
Drizzle coconut oil over the top of each cocotte.
Sprinkle chopped pistachios over the top of each cocotte.
Place the cocottes on the preheated grill and cook for 5 minutes, or until lightly browned.
